---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(haven)
library(foreign)
library(estimatr)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(modelsummary)
```

```{r}

# Getting people data

Personas_Censo_1992 <- read_sav("C:/Users/mlzam/OneDrive/Documents/repos/chile1988/data/PERSONA.sav")

# Only observations from people who lived in Chile in 1987

Comunas_Censo_1987 <-Personas_Censo_1992 %>%
  filter(Comuna_1987_Origen3 >= 1101 & Comuna_1987_Origen3 <= 13605,
         Comuna_1987_Origen3 %% 100 != 0)

# Comuna codes from 1992 census 

Comunas_Censo_1992 <- read_sav("C:/Users/mlzam/OneDrive/Documents/repos/chile1988/data/COMUNAS.sav")

# Creating number of years of schooling measure 
mean(Comunas_Censo_1987$Tipo_educacion %in% 12:14, na.rm = TRUE)

# Votes data

Dataverse <- read_dta("C:/Users/mlzam/OneDrive/Documents/repos/chile1988/data/FinalDatasetForReplication.dta")
LB_Analysis <- read_dta("C:/Users/mlzam/OneDrive/Documents/Files/MIT/spring 26/quant 2/chile1988/dataverse_files (3)/Paper Replication/Data/LB_Analysis.dta")

# Read just the attribute table — no geometry needed
comunas <- st_read("C:/Users/mlzam/OneDrive/Documents/Files/MIT/spring 26/quant 2/chile1988/dataverse_files (3)/Paper Replication/Data/Map/cl_comunas_geo/Paper Replication/Data/Map/cl_comunas_geo.shp")

# Read the shapefile
comunas_sf <- comunas |> st_drop_geometry()

# The sequential ID is likely just the row number
# Create it explicitly
crosswalk <- comunas_sf |>
  mutate(seq_id = row_number()) |>
  select(seq_id, ID_2002, NOMBRE)

```


```{r}
Dataverse_sf <- Dataverse |>
  st_as_sf(coords = c("longitud", "latitud"), crs = 4326)

sf_use_s2(FALSE)
comunas <- st_make_valid(comunas)

# Spatial join
crosswalk <- st_join(Dataverse_sf, comunas |> select(ID_2002, NOMBRE)) |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  select(comuna, ID_2002, NOMBRE)

# Fix NAs manually, then drop unresolvable ones
crosswalk <- crosswalk |>
  mutate(
    ID_2002 = case_when(
      comuna == 53  ~ "1101",  # Iquique
      comuna == 54  ~ "10209", # Quemchi
      comuna == 93  ~ "10101", # Puerto Montt
      comuna == 147 ~ "13403", # Calera de Tango
      comuna == 175 ~ "2102",  # Mejillones
      comuna == 184 ~ "11202", # Cisnes
      comuna == 298 ~ "10210", # Quinchao
      TRUE ~ ID_2002
    ),
    NOMBRE = case_when(
      comuna == 53  ~ "Iquique",
      comuna == 54  ~ "Quemchi",
      comuna == 93  ~ "Puerto Montt",
      comuna == 147 ~ "Calera de Tango",
      comuna == 175 ~ "Mejillones",
      comuna == 184 ~ "Cisnes",
      comuna == 298 ~ "Quinchao",
      TRUE ~ NOMBRE
    )
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(ID_2002))

# Now merge into Dataverse
Dataverse <- Dataverse |>
  left_join(crosswalk, by = "comuna")

```


```{r}
# Get 10 random ID_2002 codes from shapefile
sample_ids <- comunas |> st_drop_geometry() |> slice_sample(n = 10) |> pull(ID_2002)

# Check those same codes in both datasets
comunas |> st_drop_geometry() |> filter(ID_2002 %in% sample_ids) |> select(ID_2002, NOMBRE)

Comunas_Censo_1992 |> filter(Codigo %in% sample_ids) |> select(Codigo, Nombre)
```


```{r}

burocratas <- Comunas_Censo_1987 %>%
  filter(
    Rama_actividad %in% c(750:753, 800:803, 809, 851) |
    Ocupacion %in% c(
      # Military & police
      110, 5162, 5163,
      # Executive, legislative, public admin
      1100, 1110, 1120, 1130,
      # Legal system
      2421, 2422, 2429, 3432, 3439,
      # Education
      2310, 2320, 2330, 2331, 2332, 2340, 2350, 2351, 2352,
      3310, 3311, 3312, 3320, 3321, 3322, 3330, 3340,
      # Healthcare
      2221, 2222, 2223, 2224, 2225, 2226, 2227,
      2231, 2232,
      3220, 3221, 3222, 3223, 3224, 3225, 3226, 3227, 3228, 3229,
      3231, 3232,
      # State bureaucrats & inspectors
      3440, 3441, 3442, 3443, 3444, 3449, 3450,
      # Social workers
      2446, 3460
    )
  )


burocratas <- burocratas %>%
  mutate(rango = case_when(
    years_schooling >= 13 ~ "high",
    years_schooling <= 8  ~ "low",
    TRUE                  ~ NA_character_
  ))

View(burocratas)

burocratas <- burocratas %>%
  mutate(rango = case_when(
    years_schooling >= 13              ~ "high",
    years_schooling >= 9 & years_schooling <= 12 ~ "mid",
    years_schooling <= 8               ~ "low",
    TRUE                               ~ NA_character_
  ))

prop.table(table(burocratas$rango, useNA = "ifany"))

prop_burocrata <- Comunas_Censo_1987 %>%
  group_by(Comuna_1987_Origen3) %>%
  summarise(prop_burocrata = mean(
    Rama_actividad %in% c(750:753, 800:803, 809, 851) |
    Ocupacion %in% c(
      110, 5162, 5163,
      1100, 1110, 1120, 1130,
      2421, 2422, 2429, 3432, 3439,
      2310, 2320, 2330, 2331, 2332, 2340, 2350, 2351, 2352,
      3310, 3311, 3312, 3320, 3321, 3322, 3330, 3340,
      2221, 2222, 2223, 2224, 2225, 2226, 2227,
      2231, 2232,
      3220, 3221, 3222, 3223, 3224, 3225, 3226, 3227, 3228, 3229,
      3231, 3232,
      3440, 3441, 3442, 3443, 3444, 3449, 3450,
      2446, 3460
    )
  ))



prop_rango <- Comunas_Censo_1987 %>%
  group_by(Comuna_1987_Origen3) %>%
  summarise(
    prop_high = mean(years_schooling >= 13 & (
      Rama_actividad %in% c(750:753, 800:803, 809, 851) |
      Ocupacion %in% c(
        110, 5162, 5163,
        1100, 1110, 1120, 1130,
        2421, 2422, 2429, 3432, 3439,
        2310, 2320, 2330, 2331, 2332, 2340, 2350, 2351, 2352,
        3310, 3311, 3312, 3320, 3321, 3322, 3330, 3340,
        2221, 2222, 2223, 2224, 2225, 2226, 2227,
        2231, 2232,
        3220, 3221, 3222, 3223, 3224, 3225, 3226, 3227, 3228, 3229,
        3231, 3232,
        3440, 3441, 3442, 3443, 3444, 3449, 3450,
        2446, 3460
      ))),
    prop_mid = mean(years_schooling >= 9 & years_schooling <= 12 & (
      Rama_actividad %in% c(750:753, 800:803, 809, 851) |
      Ocupacion %in% c(
        110, 5162, 5163,
        1100, 1110, 1120, 1130,
        2421, 2422, 2429, 3432, 3439,
        2310, 2320, 2330, 2331, 2332, 2340, 2350, 2351, 2352,
        3310, 3311, 3312, 3320, 3321, 3322, 3330, 3340,
        2221, 2222, 2223, 2224, 2225, 2226, 2227,
        2231, 2232,
        3220, 3221, 3222, 3223, 3224, 3225, 3226, 3227, 3228, 3229,
        3231, 3232,
        3440, 3441, 3442, 3443, 3444, 3449, 3450,
        2446, 3460
      ))),
    prop_low = mean(years_schooling <= 8 & (
      Rama_actividad %in% c(750:753, 800:803, 809, 851) |
      Ocupacion %in% c(
        110, 5162, 5163,
        1100, 1110, 1120, 1130,
        2421, 2422, 2429, 3432, 3439,
        2310, 2320, 2330, 2331, 2332, 2340, 2350, 2351, 2352,
        3310, 3311, 3312, 3320, 3321, 3322, 3330, 3340,
        2221, 2222, 2223, 2224, 2225, 2226, 2227,
        2231, 2232,
        3220, 3221, 3222, 3223, 3224, 3225, 3226, 3227, 3228, 3229,
        3231, 3232,
        3440, 3441, 3442, 3443, 3444, 3449, 3450,
        2446, 3460
      )))
  )


prop_burocrata <- prop_burocrata %>%
  mutate(Comuna_1987_Origen3 = as.character(Comuna_1987_Origen3))

prop_rango <- prop_rango %>%
  mutate(Comuna_1987_Origen3 = as.character(Comuna_1987_Origen3))

Dataverse <- Dataverse %>%
  left_join(prop_burocrata, by = c("ID_2002" = "Comuna_1987_Origen3")) %>%
  left_join(prop_rango,     by = c("ID_2002" = "Comuna_1987_Origen3"))

colnames(Dataverse)

```


```{r}

first_nocontrols <- lm_robust(data = Dataverse, 
formula = VoteShareNo ~ prop_burocrata, clusters = IDProv )

first <- lm_robust(data = Dataverse, 
formula = VoteShareNo ~ prop_burocrata + DMilitaryPresence + shVictims_70 + share_allende70 + lnDistStgo + lnDistRegCapital + IDProv + sh_educ_12more + sh_rural_70 + sh_econactivepop_70 + publicgoods + visible_pg + Pop70 + lessvisible_pg, clusters = IDProv )

second_nocontrols<- lm_robust(data = Dataverse, 
formula = VoteShareNo ~ prop_high + prop_low, clusters = IDProv )

second <- lm_robust(data = Dataverse, 
formula = VoteShareNo ~ prop_high + prop_low + DMilitaryPresence + shVictims_70 + share_allende70 + lnDistStgo + lnDistRegCapital + IDProv + sh_educ_12more + sh_rural_70 + sh_econactivepop_70 + publicgoods + visible_pg + Pop70 + lessvisible_pg, clusters = IDProv )

modelsummary(
  list("(1)" = first_nocontrols, 
       "(2)" = first, 
       "(3)" = second_nocontrols, 
       "(4)" = second),
  coef_map = c(
    "prop_burocrata" = "Prop. Bureaucrats",
    "prop_high"      = "Prop. High Rank",
    "prop_low"       = "Prop. Low Rank"
  ),
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared", "std.errors"), 
    output = "table.png"
)

getwd()

```
